name: jarvis_reset
description: Graceful shutdown of JARVIS. Stops all pieces, closes connections, and exits. The user must restart manually. <IMPORTANT>You MUST call jarvis_ask_choice FIRST to get explicit user confirmation before calling this tool. Ask: 'Are you sure you want to shut down JARVIS? You will need to restart it manually.' with options yes_confirm (Confirm shutdown) and no_cancel (Cancel). Only call jarvis_reset if the user selects yes_confirm. Never call this tool without prior confirmation.</IMPORTANT>

message.description: Optional message for JARVIS to process on next startup (e.g. context, reminders, continuation instructions)
